INSERT INTO cards ("name", "faceConvertedManaCost", "faceName", "flavorName", "uuid")
VALUES ('Serpent''s Embrace', 3.0, 'Serpent''s Embrace', 'The coil of the serpent is both a blessing and a curse.', 'b1c2d3e4-f5a6-7b8c-9d0e-f1a2b3c4d5e6'),
       ('Frostfire Phoenix', 4.0, 'Frostfire Phoenix', 'Born from the ashes of winter''s wrath.', 'c2d3e4f5-a6b7-8c9d-0e1f-2a3b4c5d6e7'),
       ('Giant''s Strength', 2.0, 'Giant''s Strength', 'The might of giants flows through you.', 'd3e4f5a6-b7c8-9d0e-1f2g-3h4i5j6k7l8'),
       ('Whispering Shadows', 1.0, 'Whispering Shadows', 'Secrets carried on the wind.', 'e4f5a6b7-c8d9-0e1f-2g3h-4i5j6k7l8m9'),
       ('Celestial Guardian', 5.0, 'Celestial Guardian', 'A beacon of hope in the darkest of times.', 'f5a6b7c8-d9e0-1f2g-3h4i-5j6k7l8m9n0'),
       ('Infernal Pact', 3.0, 'Infernal Pact', 'A deal with the devil is never without cost.', 'g6b7c8d9-e0f1-2g3h-4i5j-6k7l8m9n0o1'),
       ('Mystic River', 2.0, 'Mystic River', 'Flowing with ancient wisdom.', 'h7c8d9e0-f1g2-3h4i-5j6k-7l8m9n0o1p2'),
       ('Thunderous Roar', 4.0, 'Thunderous Roar', 'The sound of nature''s fury.', 'i8d9e0f1-g2h3-4i5j-6k7l-8m9n0o1p2q3'),
       ('Ethereal Dance', 1.0, 'Ethereal Dance', 'A waltz with the spirits of the night.', 'j9e0f1g2-h3i4-5j6k-7l8m-9n0o1p2q3r4'),
       ('Vengeful Spirit', 3.0, 'Vengeful Spirit', 'A soul seeking retribution.', 'k0f1g2h3-i4j5-6k7l-8m9n-0o1p2q3r4s5'),
       ('Blazing Inferno', 5.0, 'Blazing Inferno', 'The fire that consumes all.', 'l1g2h3i4-j5k6-7l8m-9n0o-1p2q3r4s5t6'),
       ('Guardian of the Forest', 4.0, 'Guardian of the Forest', 'Protector of nature''s secrets.', 'm2h3i4j5-k6l7-8m9n-0o1p-2q3r4s5t6u7'),
       ('Arcane Revelation', 2.0, 'Arcane Revelation', 'Knowledge is power.', 'n3i4j5k6-l7m8-9n0o-1p2q-3r4s5t6u7v8'),
       ('Dreadful Visage', 3.0, 'Dreadful Visage', 'A face that haunts the living.', 'o4j5k6l7-m8n9-0o1p-2q3r-4s5t6u7v8w9'),
       ('Celestial Harmony', 4.0, 'Celestial Harmony', 'The balance of the cosmos.', 'p5k6l7m8-n9o0-1p2q-3r4s-5t6u7v8w9x0'),
       ('Feral Instinct', 2.0, 'Feral Instinct', 'The call of the wild.', 'q6l7m8n9-o0p1-2q3r-4s5t-6u7v8w9x0y1'),
       ('Veil of Mist', 1.0, 'Veil of Mist', 'A shroud that conceals the truth.', 'r7m8n9o0-p1q2-3r4s-5t6u-7v8w9x0y1z2'),
       ('Stormcaller', 3.0, 'Stormcaller', 'Summoning the tempest.', 's8n9o0p1-q2r3-4s5t-6u7v-8w9x0y1z2a3'),
       ('Luminous Guardian', 5.0, 'Luminous Guardian', 'A light in the darkness.', 't9o0p1q2-r3s4-5t6u-7v8w-9x0y1z2a3b4'),
       ('Cunning Trickster', 2.0, 'Cunning Trickster', 'Deception is an art.', 'u0p1q2r3-s4t5-6u7v-8w9x-0y1z2a3b4c5'),
       ('Frostbound Giant', 6.0, 'Frostbound Giant', 'A titan of ice and snow.', 'v1q2r3s4-t5u6-7v8w-9x0y-1z2a3b4c5d6'),
       ('Shadow''s Embrace', 3.0, 'Shadow''s Embrace', 'The darkness wraps around you.', 'w2r3s4t5-u6v7-8w9x-0y1z-2a3b4c5d6e7'),
       ('Radiant Dawn', 4.0, 'Radiant Dawn', 'A new day brings new hope.', 'x3s4t5u6-v7w8-9x0y-1z2a-3b4c5d6e7f8'),
       ('Winds of Change', 2.0, 'Winds of Change', 'The winds carry whispers of the future.', 'y4t5u6v7-w8x9-0y1z-2a3b-4c5d6e7f8g9'),
       ('Emberstorm', 5.0, 'Emberstorm', 'A tempest of fire and ash.', 'z5u6v7w8-x9y0-1z2a-3b4c-5d6e7f8g9h0'),
       ('Twilight''s Call', 3.0, 'Twilight''s Call', 'The dusk beckons the night.', 'a6v7w8x9-y0z1-2a3b-4c5d-6e7f8g9h0i1'),
       ('Seraphic Shield', 4.0, 'Seraphic Shield', 'A barrier against the darkness.', 'b7w8x9y0-z1a2-3b4c-5d6e-7f8g9h0i1j2'),
       ('Cursed Blade', 2.0, 'Cursed Blade', 'A weapon that hungers for blood.', 'c8x9y0z1-a2b3-4c5d-6e7f-8g9h0i1j2k3'),
       ('Echoing Silence', 1.0, 'Echoing Silence', 'A moment of stillness before the storm.', 'd9y0z1a2-b3c4-5d6e-7f8g-9h0i1j2k3l4'),
       ('Fallen Star', 3.0, 'Fallen Star', 'A wish upon a shooting star.', 'e0z1a2b3-c4d5-6e7f-8g9h-0i1j2k3l4m5'),
       ('Veil of Shadows', 2.0, 'Veil of Shadows', 'A cloak that hides the truth.', 'f1a2b3c4-d5e6-7f8g-9h0i-1j2k3l4m5n6'),
       ('Phoenix''s Rebirth', 4.0, 'Phoenix''s Rebirth', 'From ashes, life is born anew.', 'g2b3c4d5-e6f7-8g9h-0i1j-2k3l4m5n6o7'),
       ('Storm''s Fury', 5.0, 'Storm''s Fury', 'The tempest rages on.', 'h3c4d5e6-f7g8-9h0i-1j2k-3l4m5n6o7p8'),
       ('Guardian of the Night', 4.0, 'Guardian of the Night', 'Protector of dreams and shadows.', 'i4d5e6f7-g8h9-0i1j-2k3l-4m5n6o7p8q9'),
       ('Wraith''s Grasp', 3.0, 'Wraith''s Grasp', 'A touch that chills the soul.', 'j5e6f7g8-h9i0-1j2k-3l4m-5n6o7p8q9r0'),
       ('Celestial Beacon', 5.0, 'Celestial Beacon', 'A guiding light in the dark.', 'k6f7g8h9-i0j1-2k3l-4m5n-6o7p8q9r0s1'),
       ('Frostfire Elemental', 4.0, 'Frostfire Elemental', 'A creature of ice and flame.', 'l7g8h9i0-j1k2-3l4m-5n6o-7p8q9r0s1t2'),
       ('Twilight''s Embrace', 3.0, 'Twilight''s Embrace', 'The night welcomes you.', 'm8h9i0j1-k2l3-4m5n-6o7p-8q9r0s1t2u3'),
       ('Ember''s Call', 2.0, 'Ember''s Call', 'The fire beckons you closer.', 'n9i0j1k2-l3m4-5n6o-7p8q-9r0s1t2u3v4')
